story_arceus_09_07000/2401_1001_0100_10:
I hear you lost to Korrina,
the Fighting-type user!
story_arceus_09_07000/2401_1001_0200_10: And you have a rematch in a few days!
story_arceus_09_07000/2401_1001_0300_10:
As you are the one who beat us, we cannot
allow you to lose again!
story_arceus_09_07000/2401_1001_0400_10:
*chuckle*
Thank you. That’s very considerate of you.
story_arceus_09_07000/2401_1001_0500_10:
Don’t misunderstand! I don’t say this to
be nice!
story_arceus_09_07000/2401_1001_0600_10:
I came to make sure you haven’t lost
your edge!
story_arceus_09_07000/2401_1001_0700_10:
I’ve brought some renowned Fighting-type
experts!
story_arceus_09_07000/2401_1001_0800_10: Just wait till you hear who they are!
story_arceus_09_07000/2401_1001_1200_10:
I’m surprised you could sense our presence
even before we arrived.
story_arceus_09_07000/2401_1001_1300_10:
It seems your senses as a Psychic-type user
have been refined.
story_arceus_09_07000/2401_1001_1400_10:
Yes. I was polishing my psychic
powers here.
story_arceus_09_07000/2401_1001_1500_10:
I wanted to match Mega-Evolved
Alakazam’s precognitive power.
story_arceus_09_07000/2401_1001_1600_10:
In that case, let’s put your training to
the test!
story_arceus_09_07000/2401_1001_1800_10: OK! I’m throwing everything I have at you!
story_arceus_09_07000/2401_1001_1900_10: Well then. We shall do battle!
story_arceus_09_07000/2401_1001_2000_10: That’s it! We have a winner!
story_arceus_09_07000/2401_1001_2200_10: (I can’t believe she’s gotten so strong!)
